game.name: tribalcog
game.description: Tribal Cog packaged as a hosted Coworld with one player slot per controllable team agent.

player.name: Random Agent Player
player.description: Lightweight reference player that sends random legal Tribal Cog actions over the Coworld player protocol.

variants.name: Hosted Daily
variants.description: Hosted eight-team Tribal Cog match with one Coworld player per controllable agent.
